title: Tony's Space Race
description: A small modpack made for a Minecraft Space Race event.
body:
This is a small modpack I designed for a Minecraft Space Race event I am hosting for my friends. 

The pack has slightly modified progression, up until reaching the Moon. Nothing past that point has been modified. 
The main content is the Ad Astra mod, with a few extra mods for quality of life, such as Better Furnaces Reforged, Fabric Hammers, Nature's Compass, and Traveler's Backpack. 

This modpack also contains an informational questline for those unfamiliar with Ad Astra. However, this is through FTB Quests, which is not available on Modrinth. FTB Library, Teams, and Quests are not required to play the pack, however, if you would like them you will need to download them on your own. If you find it easier, there is a prompt in game with buttons leading to the Curseforge pages to these mods for easy download.
